title: Three-table inner join with named bindings
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_authored_in_team/1` that takes a `team_id` and returns posts authored by users in that team, along with the category name. Chain three tables: Post -> User -> (filter by team_id) -> join Category. Use named bindings `:post`, `:author`, `:category`, and reference them in select: `{p.title, u.name, c.name}`. Pin `team_id`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Three joins with three named bindings in a select. Moderate complexity.
